zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Wallace於1657年9月12日在英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾佩斯利受洗時，她的父親Walker Archibald37歲，母親Isobel Craig31歲。她於1682年2月14日與James Finlayson在蘇格蘭雷福福爾佩斯利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世在蘇格蘭雷福福爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Wallace于1657年9月12日在英国苏格兰雷福福爾佩斯利受洗时，她的父亲Walker Archibald37岁，母亲Isobel Craig31岁。她于1682年2月14日与James Finlayson在苏格兰雷福福爾佩斯利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世在苏格兰雷福福爾。

nameMeanings.name: Wallace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of   Wallis  , especially in Scotland, where the name was introduced from the Welsh Marches by a family of tenants of the Stewarts in the 12th century.
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish (Ashkenazic) surnames, e.g.   Wallach  .

variants.name: Wallis
meanings: Scottish and English: from Anglo-Norman French Waleis, Walais ‘Welshman’, also sometimes ‘Breton’ (from Old English wēalas, walas, plural of walh, wealh, originally meaning a ‘Roman citizen’ and referring to the native British population, but in Old English this term later came to mean ‘serf, unfree person, foreigner’ or ‘Welshman’). In western and central England the medieval reference is clearly to Welshmen. In Norfolk and Lincolnshire, the reference was probably to Bretons, many of whom settled in the eastern counties after the Conquest. Compare Welsh , Walsh . The idea that the Scottish surname refers to the Welsh-speaking Britons of Strathclyde is erroneous.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Wallace was christened on 12 September 1657, in Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Walker Archibald, was 37 and her mother, Isobel Craig, was 31. She married James Finlayson on 14 February 1682, in Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in Renfrewshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Wallace a été baptisée le 12 septembre 1657, à Paisley, Renfrewshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Walker Archibald, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Isobel Craig, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé James Finlayson le 14 février 1682, à Paisley, Renfrewshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée à Renfrewshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Wallace am 12. September 1657 in Paisley, Renfrewshire, Schottland, United Kingdom getauft wurde, war ihr Vater Walker Archibald 37 und ihre Mutter Isobel Craig 31. Sie hat am 14. Februar 1682 in Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland James Finlayson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb in Renfrewshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Wallace è stato battezzato il 12 settembre 1657 nel Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Walker Archibald, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Isobel Craig, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato James Finlayson il 14 febbraio 1682, nel Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel Renfrewshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Wallaceが1657年9月12日にイギリススコットランドレンフリューシュアイアペイスリーで洗礼を受けた時，父Walker Archibaldは37歳，母Isobel Craigは31歳であった。1682年2月14日にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアペイスリーでJames Finlaysonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女はスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Wallace(이)가 1657년 9월 12일 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르 파이슬리에서 침례를 받았을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walker Archibald(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isobel Craig(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1682년 2월 14일 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르 파이슬리에서 James Finlayson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르에서 사망했다.

Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James Finlayson 14 февраля 1682 г. в местности пеисли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в местности ренфрюшир, Шотландия.
